news.headline: Caesarstone to release Q4 and full year results on March 5, 2025; will host webcast and conference call at 8:30am ET.
news.summary: In MP Menashe, Israel, Caesarstone Ltd. revealed plans to unveil its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 on March 5, 2025, prior to market opening. The company, a top developer of engineered surfaces, is listed on NASDAQ as CSTE. A webcast and conference call will be held on the release day at 8:30 a.m. ET to review the figures, along with a session for investment community queries.

news.headline: Laura Rutledge secures an exclusive deal with Bloomberg.
Cheesecake Factory Q4 2024: Total revenues $921.0m (up from $877.0m in 2023), net income $41.2m, diluted net income per share $0.83.
news.summary: In Calabasas Hills, California, The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated (NASDAQ: CAKE) released their financial report for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024, ending on December 31, 2024. The total revenues for the quarter were $921.0 million, indicating growth from $877.0 million in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2023. The net income for the quarter stood at $41.2 million with a diluted net income per share of $0.83. Additionally, the Company recorded pre-tax net expenses.

news.headline: LCI Industries (NYSE: LCII) approves $1.15 quarterly cash dividend per common stock, payable on March 21, 2025 to shareholders.
news.summary: LCI Industries, a top provider of engineered components for recreation and transportation industries, recently declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.15 per common stock share. The dividend will be disbursed on March 21, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of closing on March 7, 2025. LCI Industries, traded on NYSE under LCII, operates through its Lippert subsidiary and is recognized globally for its offerings.

news.headline: Lululemon's stock RS rating improves to 82 from 76, showing strong price performance. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: Lululemon Athletica has experienced an increase in its stock price performance, leading to a rise in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 76 to 82. This upgrade signifies a stronger market position for the company.

news.headline: Lattice Semiconductor stock RS rating jumps from 78 to 84, indicating increasing price performance.
news.summary: Lattice Semiconductor has demonstrated an increase in price performance, resulting in an upgrade of its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 78 to 84. This rise in rating marks a positive trend in the stock's performance.

news.headline: Sylvamo to pay $0.45 per share dividend on April 29, for April 1 to June 30, 2025, to shareholders as of April 8.
news.summary: A global paper company, Sylvamo (NYSE: SLVM), headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share for the second quarter of 2025, covering the period from April 1 to June 30. Shareholders as of the market close on April 8, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 29, 2025. Sylvamo operates mills across Europe, Latin America, and North America and aims to be the top choice for employees, suppliers, and investors. Through sustainable practices, Sylvamo converts renewable resources into paper products.

news.headline: Mativ Holdings, Inc. disclosed Q4 and full year 2024 results, excluding Engineered Papers business.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia, Mativ Holdings, Inc. ("Mativ" or the "Company") (NYSE: MATV) released its earnings report for the three months and full year that concluded on December 31, 2024. The Company completed the sale of its Engineered Papers business on November 30, 2023. Financial results for ongoing operations do not include Engineered Papers in any period. Adjusted figures are aligned with Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) at the conclusion of this statement. Financial comparisons are made in reference to the previous year.

news.headline: Capstone Copper Corp reported Q4 2024 results: 53,942 tonnes copper production, $2.56 cash costs per pound. CEO pleased with record EBITDA.
news.summary: Capstone Copper Corp., a company listed on both the TSX and ASX exchanges, released their financial results for the three months and full year ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, they reported a total copper production of 53,942 tonnes with C1 cash costs amounting to $2.56 per payable pound of copper produced. The company's CEO, John MacKenzie, highlighted the achievement of record copper production and EBITDA generation during the year. For more details, you can access Capstone's Q4 2024 webcast presentation.

news.headline: Texas Pacific Land Corporation discloses Q4 and FY 2024 results; financial data to be released soon.
news.summary: Dallas, TX - Texas Pacific Land Corporation has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. This represents an increase of Z% compared to the previous year. Texas Pacific Land Corporation continues to demonstrate strong performance and stability in its operations.

news.headline: Atlas Energy Solutions increases quarterly dividend to $0.25 per share, from previous $0.24. Paid on Feb 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) disclosed that the Board of Directors has approved a dividend of $0.25 per share for Atlas common stock. The dividend will be distributed on February 28, 2025, to shareholders as of February 21, 2025. This marks a $0.01 increase compared to the previous quarter's dividend. Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. is a prominent player in the energy sector.

news.headline: Clearwater Analytics reports $126.5M revenue in Q4 2024 and $451.8M for full year with 27.7% growth in fourth quarter. ARR at $474.9M.
news.summary: Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWAN) revealed its financial performance for the quarter ending December 31, 2024, marking a revenue of $126.5 million for the fourth quarter and $451.8 million for the full year 2024. The year-over-year revenue growth percentages stood at 27.7% for the fourth quarter and 22.7% for the full year. The company's Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) amounted to $474.9 million. Clearwater Analytics is a global leader in Software as a Service (SaaS) investment management, accounting, reporting, and analytics solutions.

news.headline: Consolidated Communications offers financial info to bondholders and analysts on virtual platform.
news.summary: Consolidated Communications Holdings, LLC based in Mattoon, Illinois, has revealed plans to provide essential information to bondholders and securities analysts through its virtual data room platform. This information is considered significant and pertinent to investments in the company's notes. Interested parties can request access to the platform to access these materials. The company aims to periodically share key data to aid current and potential investors in their analysis.

news.summary: Tomorrow, on Feb. 20 at 11 a.m. EST, ONE Gas, Inc. (NYSE: OGS) will hold an analyst call and webcast. The company, based in Tulsa, Okla., has unveiled its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Noteworthy figures from the report are diluted earnings per share of $1.34 for the fourth quarter and $3.91 for the full year.

The company stated that it achieved favorable results for both periods, attributing its success to a robust fourth quarter performance.

news.summary: In Uniondale, New York, on February 19, 2025, ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. (NYSE: ACR) revealed plans to disclose its fourth quarter 2024 financial outcomes on Wednesday, March 5, 2025, post-market closure. Investors and interested parties are invited to attend this announcement.

news.headline: Tronox appoints Julie Beck to its Board of Directors, effective March 1, 2025. Leading titanium dioxide pigment manufacturer.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut on February 19, 2025, Tronox Holdings plc (NYSE:TROX) revealed the addition of Julie Beck to their Board of Directors starting on March 1, 2025. Tronox, a top integrated producer of titanium dioxide pigment globally, made this announcement.

news.headline: Major report reveals significant levels of unauthorized labor in Elon Musk's Texas businesses.
Allient Inc. (Nasdaq: ALNT) to hold conference call/webcast for Q4 and full year 2024 financial results.

(Nasdaq: ALNT) has disclosed their plan to conduct a conference call and webcast to discuss their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. This event is scheduled to provide insights into the company's performance and will be open to investors and the public. news.headline: PDF Solutions is acquiring secureWISE to expand its semiconductor data platform. This will add remote access, monitoring, control for manufacturing equipment at nearly 200 semiconductor factories.
news.summary: Nearly 200 semiconductor factories will have secure remote access, monitoring, and control for manufacturing equipment integrated into the PDF Solutions data network.

news.headline: Dickson Despommier, 84, advocated vertical farming in skyscrapers to tackle climate change and increase food production.
news.summary: A prominent microbiologist has gained recognition for promoting the concept of "vertical farming", which involves growing crops in high-rise structures. This innovative approach aims to address climate change issues while also providing food for a larger number of people.

news.headline: Lori Chavez-DeRemer under scrutiny at Senate hearing for supporting pro-labor bills as a House Republican.
news.summary: When questioned about her support for pro-labor legislation during her time as a House Republican, Lori Chavez-DeRemer stated that she would prioritize serving the president's agenda.

news.headline: Rocky Shore Gold Ltd. (CSE: RSG) partners with CHF Capital Markets Inc. for investor relations; important move for future growth.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 19, 2025, Rocky Shore Gold Ltd. (CSE: RSG) shared news of partnering with CHF Capital Markets Inc., a reputable Canadian company focused on investor relations and capital markets. This collaboration signifies Rocky's commitment to enhancing its market presence and connections.

news.headline: Lamar Advertising Co. declares $1.55 dividend/share, totaling at least $6.20 per share in 2025 to stockholders.
news.summary: Baton Rouge, Louisiana on February 19, 2025 - Lamar Advertising Company, traded as Nasdaq: LAMR, disclosed its declaration of a quarterly cash dividend of $1.55 per share. This dividend is set to be paid out on March 28, 2025, to all stockholders of record holding Lamar's Class A common stock and Class B common stock as of March 14, 2025. The board of directors of Lamar foresees that the combined quarterly distributions to stockholders for the year 2025, inclusive of the upcoming dividend scheduled for March 28, 2025, will be no less than $6.20 per common share.

news.headline: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. releases financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. Stock symbols: NYSE: ECO, OSE: OET.
news.summary: Today in Athens, Greece, Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. (NYSE: ECO, OSE: OET) released its unaudited financial results for Q4 and the full year 2024. The report includes details such as revenue, expenses, and profits for both periods. OET, along with its subsidiaries, provided these figures in a press release. The information can be found in the attached documents.

news.headline: Valley National Bancorp declares regular preferred and common dividends on Feb 19, 2025. Shareholders get dividends on March 14.
news.summary: Valley National Bancorp (NASDAQ: VLY) declared its regular preferred and common dividends on February 19, 2025. The holding company for Valley National Bank announced the quarterly dividends for shareholders of record on March 14, 2025. The dividends include preferred dividends of $0.30 per share and common dividends of $0.20 per share.

news.headline: Old National Bancorp declares $0.14 per share dividend, payable on March 17, 2025 to shareholders of record by March 5, 2025. Program also includes stock repurchase.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Old National Bancorp (NASDAQ: ONB) based in Evansville, Indiana, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.14 per share for its common stock shareholders. This dividend will be paid on March 17, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 5, 2025.

news.headline: Chemung Financial Corp (Nasdaq: CHMG) increases dividend by $0.01 per share to $0.32 quarterly, a 3.2% rise, payable April 1.
news.summary: Chemung Financial Corporation disclosed today that its Board of Directors granted a dividend hike of $0.01 per share, leading to a new quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share. This will be disbursed on April 1, 2025, to common stock shareholders registered by the end of business on March 18, 2025. The increase amounts to 3.2%, demonstrating the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder value.

news.headline: ACI Mechanical partners with ChillMaster to offer modular chiller options, enhancing heating and cooling solutions.
news.summary: In a recent development on February 19, 2025, ACI Mechanical & HVAC Sales has incorporated ChillMaster into their product lineup. This strategic move aims to offer enhanced heating and cooling options to consumers by utilizing modular technology to cater to changing needs. The focus is on providing tailored solutions for commercial and industrial sectors, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and advancement in the industry.

news.headline: SEC dismisses appeal in crypto rulemaking case, signaling a shift under President Trump. Appeal was voluntarily dismissed on Wednesday.
news.summary: Under President Trump, the SEC is entering a new phase as the regulator chose to withdraw its appeal on Wednesday in a crypto rulemaking case. This decision comes as a significant move reflecting the changing landscape in regulatory actions. Details on the specific case, including important numbers, were not provided.

news.headline: Smith Douglas Homes (NYSE: SDHC) to release Q4 2024 results on March 12, 2025, followed by conference call at 8:30 AM ET.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (NYSE: SDHC) is set to announce its Q4 2024 financial results on Wednesday, March 12, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call will be held on the same day at 8:30 AM Eastern Time for discussing the results and hosting a Q&A session. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing the provided numbers or by accessing a webcast link available in the investor relations section.

news.headline: Sabra Health Care REIT reports Q4 2024 results: Net income $0.19 per diluted share, FFO $0.36. EBITDARM coverage: SNF/Transitional Care 2.09x, Senior Housing 1.36x.
news.summary: TUSTIN, California - Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. (Nasdaq: SBRA) disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024. The results per diluted common share in Q4 2024 were: Net Income: $0.19, FFO: $0.36, Normalized FFO: $0.35, AFFO: $0.36, and Normalized AFFO: $0.36. The EBITDARM coverage summary for the quarter showed Skilled Nursing/Transitional Care at 2.09x and Senior Housing - Leased at 1.36x. The company also highlighted recent events without providing specific details.

news.headline: Vimeo releases Q4 and annual 2024 shareholder letter on its IR site. Key information available at https://www.vimeo.com/investors.
news.summary: Vimeo released its shareholder letter for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on their website's investor relations page. The information was made public on February 19, 2025. Investors and interested parties can access the letter at vimeo.com/investors for details on the company's performance during the specified period.

news.headline: Stronghold Digital Mining urges stockholders to vote "FOR" the merger with Bitfarms at the special meeting on Feb. 27. ISS and Glass Lewis recommend the merger.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Stronghold Digital Mining, Inc. (NASDAQ: SDIG) revealed that Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) and Glass Lewis & Co. have advised Stronghold stockholders to vote "FOR" the proposed merger with Bitfarms Ltd. (NASDAQ/TSX: BIT) at the special meeting on February 27, 2025. The merger is set to be a significant move for both companies, with Bitfarms being a prominent player in the industry. This announcement comes as a crucial step towards finalizing the merger, highlighting the growing support for the union between Stronghold and Bitfarms.

news.headline: Mister Car Wash announces Q4 ‘24 & full year results; record revenue & EBITDA; facing consumer challenges.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, Mister Car Wash, Inc. (Nasdaq: MCW), the largest car wash brand in the U.S., disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company expressed contentment with their fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 performance. Despite consumer challenges and heightened competition, Mister Car Wash achieved record revenue and EBITDA. The company noted an improvement in results as the year advanced. This progression was achieved amidst a tough consumer climate and increased market competition.

news.headline: Holley Performance Brands (NYSE: HLLY) to announce Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 11, 2025 at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Holley Performance Brands, a renowned automotive aftermarket performance solutions company trading on NYSE under the ticker symbol HLLY, has disclosed the scheduled announcement date for their financial performance in the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The unveiling of Holley's financial results for Q4 and FY 2024 will take place on Tuesday, March 11, 2025, at 8:30 am (Eastern Time). A conference call and live webcast have been organized by the company to delve into the details of their financial standing during that period. This event will be crucial for investors and stakeholders to gain insights into the company's financial health and strategic outlook moving forward.

news.headline: Carvana reports record earnings for Q4 and FY 2024, becoming most profitable US automotive retailer. Shareholder letter for details.
Herbalife's Q4 net sales hit $1.2 billion, meeting guidance at high end, with 0.6% decline from Q4 ‘23. Adjusted EBITDA exceeds expectations.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Herbalife Ltd. (NYSE: HLF) released its financial figures for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The Chairman and CEO, Michael Johnson, expressed positivity about the company’s achievements, highlighting three consecutive quarters of new distributor growth, a new CEO incoming, and significantly enhanced Adjusted EBITDA margins. The fourth quarter of 2024 saw net sales of $1.2 billion, indicating a decrease of 0.6% compared to Q4 of 2023, aligning with the upper range of projected guidance. This figure encompasses 330 basis points of FX impacts.

news.headline: Agilent declares 24.8 cents per share dividend; payable on April 23, 2025, for shareholders on record by April 1.
news.summary: Agilent Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: A), based in Santa Clara, California, declared a quarterly dividend of 24.8 cents per common stock share. This dividend is set to be disbursed on April 23, 2025, to all shareholders recorded by April 1, 2025. The company's board of directors retains the authority to decide on the timing and value of upcoming dividends. Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) focuses on analytical technologies and is a prominent player in the global market.

news.headline: GitLab CEO Bill Staples & CFO Brian Robins to speak at Morgan Stanley conference in San Francisco on March 5, 2025. Webcast link provided.
news.summary: GitLab Inc., a leading AI-powered DevSecOps platform traded on NASDAQ as GTLB, revealed that their CEO, Bill Staples, and CFO, Brian Robins, will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco on March 5, 2025. The event is set for 1:50 p.m. Pacific Time and can be viewed via live webcast at the provided link.

news.headline: Financial comparison website NerdWallet reveals its Q4 and 2024 full-year performance data.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that due to the ongoing pandemic, there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates across the country. The latest data shows that more than 20 million individuals have filed for unemployment benefits in the past few weeks, indicating the severity of the economic impact caused by the crisis. This surge in job loss has led to a nationwide unemployment rate of over 14%, the highest seen in several decades. The situation has prompted government officials to implement various relief measures to support those affected, including stimulus packages and expanded unemployment benefits. Despite these efforts, the road to economic recovery remains uncertain as the situation continues to evolve.

news.headline: Enovix (Nasdaq: ENVX) reported its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 in Fremont, California.
news.summary: Enovix Corporation, a high-performance battery company based in Fremont, California, and listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ENVX, released its financial figures for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 19, 2025. The President and CEO, Dr. Raj Talluri, provided a summary of the results.

news.headline: IMAX Corp. (NYSE: IMAX) reports strong Q4 & full-year 2024 results, highlighting success during Chinese New Year.
news.summary: IMAX Corporation (NYSE: IMAX) recently announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2024, showcasing the strength of its global entertainment platform and extensive content offerings. The company highlighted its success during Chinese New Year, achieving record-breaking numbers that underscore the benefits of its diversified content portfolio spanning major Hollywood releases and local language blockbusters. With a vast global network in place, IMAX has effectively leveraged its position to maximize box office revenue.

news.headline: Klaviyo (NYSE: KVYO) reports $1 billion revenue run rate in Q4 and fiscal year 2024. Strong Black Friday Cyber Monday performance.
news.summary: In Boston, Klaviyo (NYSE: KVYO) revealed its performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024. The company achieved significant milestones, surpassing a $1 billion revenue run rate. It marked a successful Black Friday Cyber Monday period and showcased robust growth throughout 2024, underscoring the importance of its intelligent data platform. Klaviyo serves over 167,000 customers, demonstrating its impact on driving growth and fostering digital relationships. Andrew, the spokesperson, emphasized the success and pivotal role of the platform in facilitating these achievements.

news.headline: Amplitude reports strong 2024 financial results. CEO notes success in customer adoption and enterprise progress.

Skates added, "Businesses require three essentials: reliable data, insights into customer behavior, and an...

news.headline: Pinterest CEO Bill Ready will speak at Morgan Stanley Conference on March 6, 2025, 8:30 a.m. PST. Webcast available.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) shared that CEO Bill Ready will engage in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 6th, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. PST / 11:30 a.m. EST. The presentation will be live-streamed and available for replay on Pinterest’s Investor Relations site at investor.pinterest.com. The company utilizes this platform for disclosure purposes and plans to persist in doing so.

news.headline: SkyWater Technology (NASDAQ: SKYT) moves up release date of Q4 financial results to Feb 26 before market open.
news.summary: BLOOMINGTON, Minnesota - SkyWater Technology (NASDAQ: SKYT), a leading technology realization partner, has revealed that they will release their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 earlier than expected. Due to numerous semiconductor industry companies reporting their results on Wednesday afternoon, February 26th, SkyWater Technology opted to reschedule their financial report and webcast to be available before the market opens on the same day. The webcast link previously provided will remain the same for easy access to the information. Stay tuned for SkyWater Technology's fiscal fourth-quarter results.

news.headline: Farmland Partners Inc. reported full-year 2024 results, with net income of $61.5 million and AFFO of $14.1 million.
Calavo Growers (CVGW) to announce Q1 2025 financial results on March 12 after market close.
